items.name: minimal-hero-section-with-parallax-images
items.description: Minimal Hero Section With Parallax Images, images are displayed on top of each other with animation. Simple hero section with Title, description, CTA Buttons and images.

items.name: hero-with-image-and-scales
items.description: A modern hero section with image and scales. Incorporates tailwind's blue 500 variant of color. A beautiful hero section with title, description, 2 CTA buttons and an Image. Image has a mouse move event that shows the scales behind the image. Perfect for hero sections that require a  modern look.

items.name: logo-cloud-with-blur-animation
items.description: A collection of 6 logos of modern companies, animation is staggered and logos are aligned in a grid of 3. Perfect for logo clouds that require a modern look.

items.name: logo-cloud-with-swap-animation
items.description: A logo cloud with 10 logos in a 5x2 grid that swap every 3 seconds. Logos animate horizontally with blur effect and staggered timing for a smooth transition.

items.name: single-row-logo-cloud
items.description: A single row logo cloud with 5 logos that flips in an interval.

items.name: features-grid-with-large-skeletons
items.description: A grid of 3 with micro-interactions and animations. Title and descriptions are flex row aligned on desktop screens and column on mobile screens. There are skeleton items with perspective designs, adding depth into the design. Cards have title, description, badge, and tags.

items.name: pricing-page-with-featured-and-enterprise
items.description: Pricing Page With Featured And Enterprise. This pricing page is designed to showcase the features of the product and the enterprise plan. It includes a featured plan with a discount, a regular plan, a bigger plan and an enterprise plan. Featured plan has an immersive shadow to make it stand out.

items.name: bento-grid-with-skeletons
items.description: A grid of 6 with skeletons, title and descriptions. Skeletons are modern and designed to be minimal. With chat like interfaces for skeletons, perfect for showcasing features or demos of product.

items.description: A spotlight shader for creating dynamic spotlight background effects with customizable positions and animations.
